# Daily Log - 2026-04-07

[[2026-04-06|← Yesterday]] | [[2026-04-08|Tomorrow →]]

Good productive day. Spent the morning [[cycling]] and thinking through the
training schedule for the month. Met with [[Marcus]] and [[Jordan]] to go over
the project timeline. We've been making solid progress on the new feature set
and the deadlines feel manageable. Had a long conversation with [[Sarah]] about
career goals — she's considering switching teams. Made a healthy dinner and
went to bed early for once.

## Daily Questions
- One thing I'm proud of today: staying off my phone during meals.
- One thing I want to carry forward: the early morning cycling routine.
